announcements.title: Action needed: auto-update is broken in v0.38.5 to v0.39.0
announcements.body: A bug in update checksum verification means spotatui v0.38.5 through v0.39.0 cannot update themselves: the update check fails silently on every launch. The fix ships in v0.39.1, but affected versions cannot reach it on their own. Please update once manually (winget upgrade, brew upgrade, your package manager, or the GitHub releases page). Auto-update works again from v0.39.1 onward.

announcements.title: New: Lua plugin scripting
announcements.body: spotatui now supports Lua plugins, letting you extend and automate the app with your own scripts. Use `spotatui plugin new` to scaffold a plugin, then hook into the plugin API to add custom behavior. See the docs to get started, and share what you build with the spotatui-plugin topic on GitHub.

announcements.title: Help wanted: Sonos integration
announcements.body: Sonos support was requested in Discussion #247 and is now tracked in Issue #251. I started a WIP branch named sonosWIP, but discovery currently only sees a Sonos speaker for a few seconds before it disappears. My test speaker broke, so I cannot continue debugging locally. If you have Sonos speakers and know Rust, help testing or completing the integration would be very welcome.

announcements.title: Major Refactor Complete
announcements.body: A large refactor has just landed to make spotatui cleaner, more stable, and easier to build on. If you have been thinking about contributing, now is a great time to jump in! Issues, fixes, docs, and feature ideas are all welcome!
